note: Declarative targeted-mutation manifest for scripts/run-mutation-proof.ps1 (Phase 4 Slice 1). Each entry names ONE integrity-critical behavior, the EXACT single-site source edit that breaks it, and the EXISTING focused test that MUST catch it. Mutations are applied ONLY inside an isolated, git-ignored scratch copy of app/ (under app/.pcc-mut-tmp/, deleted at the end of each run unless -KeepTemp); real DATA and tracked source (chats, PROJECT.md, .cockpit/state, node_modules, committed files) are only READ. Line endings are normalized to LF before matching, so a multi-line `find` uses \n. This is NOT a mutation-score tool: it proves a fixed set of test<->behavior pairings, nothing about global coverage.

mutations.priority: atomic writes must fail closed and preserve the previous good generation
mutations.productBehavior: writeJsonAtomic: when the current target EXISTS but cannot be read, FAIL CLOSED (never overwrite a possibly-good, momentarily-unreadable file).
mutations.detector: a valid-but-UNREADABLE current target FAILS CLOSED (never silently overwritten)
mutations.find:
_cleanup(targetTmp);
      return { ok: false, error: 'prev_preserve_failed: current unreadable: ' + e.message };
mutations.replace: curRaw = Buffer.from('{}', 'utf8'); // MUTANT: swallow unreadable current and proceed (fail-open)

mutations.priority: stale revision / identity mismatches must be rejected
mutations.productBehavior: mapCiStatusToChip: a CI result may light the Verified chip green ONLY if its sha equals the requested commit sha (exact-SHA binding).
mutations.detector: a passed result bound to a different sha -> NOT available (sha_mismatch, never green)
mutations.replace: const bound = true; // MUTANT: ignore exact-SHA binding

mutations.priority: malformed / mis-scoped execution-authority state must not grant build authority
mutations.productBehavior: authorizeSend: a send is build-authorized ONLY when it targets the exact chatId the owner approved (a different chat is never build and never renews).
mutations.detector: renewal is chat-SCOPED: a matching-mode send from a DIFFERENT chat is never build and never renews
mutations.replace: const ok = mode === 'authorized_running' && !!authorizedJob; // MUTANT: drop chatId scoping

mutations.priority: unknown / unreadable verification facts must never become green
mutations.productBehavior: isTrustedLocalProof: a hand-editable record may be trusted to claim ONLY local_execution; a forged ci_execution/live_boundary TYPE line must NOT count as executed proof.
mutations.detector: isTrustedLocalProof trusts only local_execution (forged CI/clean-room claims are rejected)
mutations.replace: return type === 'local_execution' || type === 'ci_execution'; // MUTANT: trust a forged CI type

mutations.priority: commit or working-tree changes must invalidate prior verification
mutations.productBehavior: matchesCurrentCommit: a recorded verification does NOT cover current code when the working tree is dirty (uncommitted edits).
mutations.detector: matchesCurrentCommit is true only for an exact sha match on a clean tree
mutations.replace: if (dirty) { /* MUTANT: ignore a dirty working tree */ }
